description_long: This sculpture depicts a bust of a veiled figure adorned with a garland of flowers around the head. The veil is rendered with remarkable detail, draping softly over the face and shoulders, creating a sense of translucency and delicacy. The floral garland is intricately sculpted, with individual petals and leaves visible, adding a naturalistic touch to the otherwise classical form. The back of the sculpture shows the veil cascading down, tied with a ribbon, and the folds of the fabric are deeply carved to enhance the illusion of softness. The material appears to be a smooth, light-colored stone or marble, giving the piece a refined and elegant appearance. The overall craftsmanship suggests a high level of artistic skill, with attention to both anatomical and textile details.
description: A finely detailed bust of a veiled figure with a floral garland, sculpted in smooth, light-colored stone. The veil and flowers are intricately rendered, creating a lifelike and delicate effect.
description_view_0: Front view showing the veiled face, floral garland, and detailed drapery over the shoulders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the veil's folds and the three-dimensionality of the garland.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cascading veil, tied ribbon, and the back of the floral garland.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the layered drapery and the sculpted texture of the veil.
attribute_subject_matter: veiled human bust with floral garland
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
